title: Pickle Pack
description:
This Pack adds Pickles
to the experience of minecraft :D
body:
### Version:
Should tehcnically work on all versions. If it says its not compatible with the game version, just try it out. Ths is because the pack.mcmeta version isnt set properly. i wont update the version all the time unless i update something in the pack wich is worth sharing, sorry.


### Features:
- Carrots are now Pickles (Including golden carrots and carrots on a stick)



### Changed Textures:
- Carrot 
- Carrot on a stick
- growth stages of carrots
- golden carrot
- enchanted golden apple


### Changed Item Names:
- Carrot -> Pickle
- Carrot on a stick -> Pickle on a stick
- golden carrot -> Golden Pickle
- enchanted golden apple -> enchanted Golden Pickle

### Ideas / Todo
- ✅ enchanted golden apple to enchanted golden pickle (todo)
- ❌ Replace / Add some custom paintings (idea)
- ❌ Custom items (idea)


submit any ideas to me
